---
title: "Mapa Perú"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#install.packages(c("sf", "ggplot2", "viridis", "dplyr", "scales","ggrepel"),
                 #repos = "https://cran.r-project.org")
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(scales)
library(dplyr)

peru_dep <- st_read("C:/Users/Renato/MAPA/INEI_LIMITE_DEPARTAMENTAL_GEOGPSPERU_JUANSUYO_931381206.shp")
```

```{r}
names(peru_dep)
```

```{r}

ggplot(peru_dep) +
  geom_sf(fill = "#F3F4F6", color = "#D1D5DB", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "División política del Perú por departamentos") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
datos <- read.csv("C:/Users/Renato/MAPA/SINADEF_DATOS_ABIERTOS.csv")

names(datos)
```

```{r}
datos <- datos %>%
  mutate(
    across(starts_with("CAUSA_"), ~ toupper(trimws(.))),
    MUERTE_VIOLENTA = toupper(trimws(MUERTE_VIOLENTA)),
    DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO = toupper(trimws(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO))
  )


suicidios <- datos %>%
  mutate(
    suicidio = grepl("^X6[0-9]|^X7[0-9]|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_A_CIEX) |
               grepl("^X6[0-9]|^X7[0-9]|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_B_CIEX) |
               grepl("^X6[0-9]|^X7[0-9]|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_C_CIEX) |
               grepl("^X6[0-9]|^X7[0-9]|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_D_CIEX) |
               grepl("^X6[0-9]|^X7[0-9]|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_E_CIEX) |
               grepl("^X6[0-9]|^X7[0-9]|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_F_CIEX) |
               MUERTE_VIOLENTA == "SUICIDIO"
  ) %>%
  filter(suicidio)

DF <- suicidios %>%
  group_by(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO) %>%
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO = ifelse(
      DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO == "LIMA METROPOLITANA",
      "LIMA",
      DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO
    )
  )

mapa <- peru_dep %>%
  mutate(NOMBDEP = toupper(trimws(NOMBDEP))) %>%
  left_join(DF, by = c("NOMBDEP" = "DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO"))

mapa$total[is.na(mapa$total)] <- 0
```

```{r}
write.csv(DF,
          "C:/Users/Renato/MAPA/suicidios_por_departamento.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}

p <- ggplot(mapa_proj) +
  geom_sf(
    aes(fill = total),
    color     = "white",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c("#FFF7EC", "#FEE8C8", "#FDD49E", 
                "#FC8D59", "#E34A33", "#B30000"),
    trans   = "sqrt", 
    name    = "Casos\nregistrados",
    limits  = c(0, mx),
    breaks  = breaks_v,
    labels  = comma,
    guide   = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth        = 0.8,
      barheight       = 8,
      title.position  = "top",
      title.hjust      = 0.5,
      ticks.colour    = "#666666",
      ticks.linewidth = 0.4,
      frame.colour    = "#DDDDDD",
      frame.linewidth = 0.4
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim   = c(bb["xmin"] - padx, bb["xmax"] + padx),
    ylim   = c(bb["ymin"] - pady, bb["ymax"] + pady),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Mortalidad por suicidio en el Perú",
    subtitle = paste0("Casos acumulados por departamento (2017 - 2026)\n", 
                      "Filtro: Códigos CIE-10 y Variable 'Muerte Violenta'"),
    caption  = "Fuente: SINADEF – MINSA | Elaboración propia"
  ) +
  theme_void(base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size   = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, 
      color  = "#111111", margin = margin(t = 14, b = 3)
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size   = 9, hjust = 0.5, 
      color  = "#555555", margin = margin(b = 8)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size   = 7, hjust = 0.5, 
      color  = "#999999", margin = margin(t = 8, b = 10)
    ),
    legend.position      = "right",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.title  = element_text(color = "#222222", size = 8, 
                                 face = "bold", lineheight = 1.4),
    legend.text   = element_text(color = "#444444", size = 7.5),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 8, 8, 8)
  )

ggsave(
  "mapa_suicidios_peru_final.png",
  plot   = p,
  width  = 6,
  height = 9,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "white"
)
print(p)
```
